ParryHigh.description: Block high/mid attacks. Parry timing count sets active parry frames (1-20).
ParryHigh.weakness: loses to grabs, does no damage

ParryAfterWhiff.description: Block after a whiffed attack. Same as ParryHigh but in recovery.

ParrySuper.description: Push Block — costs meter, creates distance on block.

Roll.description: Dodge roll — invincible movement. Direction payload is usually fixed.
Roll.weakness: vulnerable after invincibility ends, loses to delayed attacks

Wait.description: Do nothing this turn. Low commitment, preserves options.
Wait.weakness: gives up initiative, opponent acts freely

DefensiveBurst.description: Burst — invincible reversal, costs burst stock. Emergency escape.
DefensiveBurst.weakness: limited stock (usually 1-2 per match), huge loss if baited

OffensiveBurst.description: Burst Cancel — cancel current attack into pressure. Costs burst.
OffensiveBurst.weakness: costs burst stock, wasted if not in an attack

Grab.description: Standard throw — beats blocking, loses to attacks. Short range.
Grab.weakness: loses to attacks, very short range

AirGrab.weakness: loses to air attacks, requires both players airborne

DashForward.description: Dash forward — close distance. Distance payload (0-100) controls how far.
DashForward.weakness: vulnerable during dash, predictable if repeated

DashBackward.weakness: gives up stage position, can get cornered

Jump.description: Jump — become airborne. JumpArc payload controls trajectory.

SuperJump.description: High/far jump. JumpArc payload controls arc.

ChargeDash.description: Super Dash — fast armored dash forward.
ChargeDash.weakness: loses to grabs and multi-hit moves

InstantCancel.description: Cancel current move animation instantly. Costs meter.

WhiffInstantCancel.description: Cancel a whiffed move. Costs meter.

Taunt.description: Hustle/taunt — builds meter but leaves you vulnerable.
Taunt.weakness: fully vulnerable during animation, punishable at any range

TechRoll.description: Tech roll on knockdown — dodge while getting up.

ForwardDashFollowup.description: Follow-up attack after a forward dash. Good for closing distance and attacking.

HSlash2.weakness: loses to blocking (punishable), slow startup vs fast attacks

VSlash.description: Vertical Slash — overhead sword swing, strong damage.

UpwardSwipe.description: Upward Swipe — anti-air sword launch. Use when opponent is airborne.
UpwardSwipe.weakness: short range, whiffs vs grounded opponents at distance

Stinger.description: Stinger — forward lunge stab, long reach, high damage. Best mid-range poke.
Stinger.beats: opponents at mid range, good punish tool
Stinger.weakness: very punishable on block or whiff, committed lunge

PistolWhip.description: Pistol Whip — multi-hit gun-butt attack. Requires Quick Draw stance.
PistolWhip.beats: close-range pressure, chip damage through block

AnkleCutter.description: Ankle Cutter — low sweep, hits crouching opponents.

Pommel.description: Pommel strike — fast, safe on block. Combos into 3Combo or HSlash2.
Pommel.beats: beats grabs due to speed, safe pressure starter

Lasso.description: Lasso — thrown rope, leads to Pull or Izuna Drop on hit. Long-range grab.
Lasso.weakness: loses to attacks (can be hit during throw), slow

IzunaDrop.weakness: very slow, easily interrupted by any attack

3Combo.description: 3-hit combo — automatic multi-hit string. Good after Pommel.

LightningSlice.description: Lightning Slice — tracking aerial slash, directional aim.
LightningSlice.beats: opponents in the air, good at range
LightningSlice.weakness: loses to blocking, punishable on whiff, airborne so vulnerable to anti-airs

LightningSliceNeutral.description: Lightning Slice neutral — fast ranged attack.
LightningSliceNeutral.weakness: loses to blocking and parry, punishable on whiff, predictable if overused

LightningSliceCancel.description: Lightning Slice cancel — faster recovery, less damage.
LightningSliceCancel.weakness: low damage, still loses to blocking

BackSlash.description: Backward slash — retreat while attacking. Safe spacing tool.
BackSlash.weakness: lower damage than committed attacks, gives up position

Impale.description: Impale — very high damage commitment. Huge risk, huge reward.
Impale.beats: blocking opponents, massive damage if it lands
Impale.weakness: extremely slow, any attack beats it, huge whiff punish

ImpaleTeleport.description: Teleport Impale variant — teleports behind opponent.

GunThrow.description: Throw your gun as a projectile. Loses gun access until retrieved.
GunThrow.weakness: loses gun access, need GunReel to recover

GunReel.description: Pull thrown gun back with lasso.

Shoot2.description: Shoot — fires revolver bullet. Costs 1 bullet. Requires Quick Draw stance (use Brandish first).
Shoot2.weakness: limited bullets, requires Brandish stance first

ShootDodge2.description: Shoot while dodging — evasive gunshot. Requires Quick Draw stance.
ShootDodge2.weakness: limited bullets, requires Brandish stance first

PointBlank.description: Point Blank — close-range devastating shot. Requires Quick Draw stance.
PointBlank.weakness: very short range, requires Brandish stance first, costs bullet

Brandish.description: Quick Draw stance entry. Unlocks Shoot, PointBlank, PistolWhip, and ShootDodge next turn. Use this to access gun moves.
Brandish.weakness: costs a turn to set up, does no damage itself

QuickerDraw.description: Faster Quick Draw variant. Unlocks gun moves like Brandish.

Foresight.description: Place temporal afterimage marker. Can teleport back to it later.
Foresight.weakness: does no damage, costs a turn to set up

1000Cuts.description: 1000 Cuts — projectile buff super, enhances all attacks. Costs meter.

TimeSplitter.description: Time Splitter — multi-hit temporal super, 12 hits. Costs meter.
TimeSplitter.weakness: costs meter, punishable if blocked or whiffed

1000CutsEnd.description: End 1000 Cuts buff early with Fatal Cut.

FastTeleport.description: Teleport — instant repositioning super. Costs meter.

TimeBullet.description: Temporal Round — fires a time-frozen bullet. Costs meter.

SpotDodge.description: Spot Dodge — quick stationary dodge, fast recovery.
SpotDodge.beats: avoids attacks without moving, fast recovery allows punish
SpotDodge.weakness: loses to grabs, loses to delayed attacks

Guntrick.description: Gun Trick — counter-parry with gun. Counters attacks with a shot.

Holster.description: Holster gun — exit Quick Draw stance.

NunChukLight.weakness: short range, loses to blocking at distance

NunChukHeavy.weakness: short range, slower than light version

GroundedPunch.description: Basic punch — fast, low damage. Good combo starter.

GroundedSweep.weakness: loses to jumping, punishable on block

DropKick.description: Drop Kick — running forward kick, great range.
DropKick.weakness: very punishable on block, committed forward movement

DiveKick.description: Dive Kick — aerial dive kick downward.

SlideKick.description: Slide Kick — sliding low multi-hit, goes under projectiles.
SlideKick.weakness: loses to blocking low, punishable on block

Stomp.weakness: very slow, easily blocked or avoided

PalmStrike.description: Palm Strike — very high damage, momentum-boosted. Ninja's biggest punish.
PalmStrike.beats: massive damage on hit, best punish tool
PalmStrike.weakness: short range, loses to blocking, high commitment

Fireball.beats: safe chip at range, controls space
Fireball.weakness: low damage, can be jumped over

GrapplingHook.description: Grappling Hook — mobility/pull tool. Aim direction payload.
GrapplingHook.weakness: does no damage, vulnerable during animation

Uppercut.beats: opponents at close range, launches for air combos
Uppercut.weakness: short range, very punishable on whiff

JumpKick.beats: opponents on the ground from air approach

StickyBomb.description: Deploy Sticky Bomb — can be detonated later. Max 3 on field.
StickyBomb.beats: area denial, detonates for damage later
StickyBomb.weakness: delayed payoff, costs a turn to place

StickyBombThrow.description: Throw Sticky Bomb directly at opponent.

HitGrab.description: Skull Shaker — hit-grab that causes bleed damage over time.
HitGrab.weakness: short range, loses to fast attacks

IzunaDrop.description: Izuna Drop — high-damage aerial command grab.
IzunaDrop.weakness: very slow, loses to air attacks

Substitution.description: Substitution — ninja teleport escape. Instant invincibility.

BackSway.description: Backward sway dodge — avoids attacks while staying close.
BackSway.weakness: loses to grabs, doesn't create much distance

StoreMomentum.description: Store current velocity for later release burst.
StoreMomentum.beats: stores speed for explosive later movement

QuickSlash.description: Quick Slash — super multi-hit slash, 12 hits. Costs meter.
QuickSlash.beats: massive damage, fast startup for a super

Caltrops.description: Caltrops — drops trap projectiles on the ground. Area denial.

Slap.description: PING — fast light slap. Quick poke.

EyeBeam.description: OPTICAL BEAM — multi-hit eye laser. Great at range.
EyeBeam.beats: opponents at range, multi-hit chips through block
EyeBeam.weakness: slow startup, punishable at close range

SawBlade.description: SAW BLADE — aerial saw blade, leaves lingering projectile.

Vacuum.description: VACUUM — suction grab attack. Robot's best grab.
Vacuum.beats: blocking opponents, decent range for a grab
Vacuum.weakness: loses to attacks, has startup delay

DriveJump.description: JUMPSTART — Drive mode jump attack. Requires Drive stance.

DriveDrift.description: DRIFT — Drive mode drift attack. Requires Drive stance.
DriveDrift.beats: fast repositioning attack in Drive mode

DriveWheelie.description: WHEELIE — Drive mode wheelie, 3-hit. Requires Drive stance.

DriveWheelieGrab.description: CLUTCH — Drive mode grab. Requires Drive stance.

ClapJump.description: THUNDER CLAP — thunder clap jump, good anti-air.

Flamethrower.description: FLAME THROWER — multi-hit fire. Good pressure.

Chainsaw.description: CHAIN SAW — multi-tick sustained damage. High commitment.
Chainsaw.beats: huge damage if it connects at close range
Chainsaw.weakness: extremely slow, short range, easily avoided

CommandGrab.description: COMMAND: GRAB — command grab, beats blocking.
CommandGrab.weakness: very slow, loses to attacks and jumps

DisembowelHitGrab.weakness: slow startup, loses to fast attacks

CornerCarryHitGrab.description: BOUNDS CHECK — corner carry hit-grab. Pushes opponent to corner.

Grenade.description: REMOTE BOMB — remote detonation bomb. Place and detonate later.

Magnetize.description: MAGNETIZE — magnetize opponent/projectile. Pulls things toward Robot.

Drive.description: DRIVE — enter motorcycle Drive mode. Unlocks DriveJump, DriveDrift, DriveWheelie, DriveWheelieGrab.
Drive.weakness: costs a turn to enter stance

KillProcess.description: KILL PROCESS — devastating super, 400 damage. Costs meter.
KillProcess.beats: one-shot kill potential at close range
KillProcess.weakness: extremely slow, short range, huge meter cost

LOIC.description: LOIC — orbital strike. Delay payload controls targeting. Costs meter.
LOIC.beats: unavoidable at certain timings, fullscreen damage
LOIC.weakness: slow, costs meter, delay makes it readable

DriveBoost.description: BOOST — Drive mode boost super. Requires Drive stance.

TomeSlap.description: Tome Slap — fast book slap. Wizard's fastest attack.

ManaStrike.description: Mana Strike — mana punch, works air/ground.
ManaStrike.beats: versatile fast attack in air or ground

BoltOfMagma.description: Bolt of Magma — multi-hit magma blast. Strong damage at mid range.
BoltOfMagma.beats: mid-range pressure, multi-hit chips through block
BoltOfMagma.weakness: punishable at close range if dodged

ConjureWeapon.description: Conjure Weapon — create weapon to attack, high damage.
ConjureWeapon.weakness: moderate startup, loses to fast attacks

ConjureStorm.description: Conjure Storm — 3-hit storm, slow startup. Element/direction payload.
ConjureStorm.weakness: very slow startup, punishable up close

ZephyrThrow.description: Zephyr Throw — wind-powered throw, very high damage.

Liftoff.description: Missile Form — dash attack, high speed.
Liftoff.beats: fast approach, covers distance while attacking

MagicMissile.beats: safe chip at any range, aimable

VileClutch.description: Vile Clutch — fast grab. Wizard's quickest grab option.

Geyser.description: Geyser — trap that erupts. 3 charge levels: higher charge = more damage and range. Set up, then detonate.
Geyser.beats: massive damage at max charge, area denial

Orb.description: Orb — create magic orb. Opens up many follow-up options (Launch, SparkBomb, Teleport). Costs meter.
Orb.weakness: costs meter, needs follow-up to be useful

Launch.description: Launch orb forward — sends orb as projectile.

SparkBomb.description: Spark Bomb — orb explodes for high damage.
SparkBomb.beats: high damage if orb is near opponent

OrbTether.description: Tether to orb — connect yourself to the orb.

OrbTeleport.description: Orb Portal — teleport to orb location. Instant.
OrbTeleport.weakness: requires orb to be placed first

Swipe.description: Swipe — basic claw swipe. Fast and reliable.

SwipeDown.description: Low Swipe — low sweeping claw. Hits low.

SwipeUp.description: Upward Swipe — anti-air claw. Use when opponent is airborne.
SwipeUp.weakness: whiffs vs grounded opponents at distance

Slash.description: Slash — strong claw slash. Solid mid-range option.

Sweep.description: Sweep — high damage sweep attack. Knockdown on hit.
Sweep.beats: opponents standing or blocking high, causes knockdown
Sweep.weakness: loses to jumping, punishable on block

OverheadClaw.description: Overhead Claw — overhead attack, hits high.

GroundToAirSpin.description: Shred — multi-hit spinning attack (9 hits), ground-to-air.
GroundToAirSpin.beats: massive damage if it connects, multi-hit pressure

AirSpin.description: Aerial Shred — multi-hit aerial spin (6 hits).

AcidSlashH.description: Horizontal Acid Slash — acid-coated slash, applies acid DoT.
AcidSlashH.beats: applies damage over time on hit

AcidSlashJ.description: Leap Slash — leaping acid slash, 10-hit pattern. Great approach.

AcidSlashV.description: Vertical Acid Slash — aerial acid slash.

CausticSpike.description: Caustic Spike — acid projectile. Direction payload.

TwistAttack.description: Corkscrew — spinning multi-hit attack. Direction payload.

BiteGrab.description: Envenom — poison bite grab, applies damage over time.
BiteGrab.beats: blocking opponents, poison DoT adds extra damage
BiteGrab.weakness: very slow, loses to any attack

WallTrick.description: Pounce — wall pounce attack, 7-hit combo potential.
WallTrick.weakness: requires wall nearby, punishable if read

DashThroughAttack.description: Sneak Attack — dash through opponent and attack. Crosses up.
DashThroughAttack.weakness: predictable if overused, loses to fast reactions

ProjectileGrab.description: Vault — aerial grab that goes over projectiles.

CausticBarrage.description: Caustic Barrage — acid barrage super. Costs meter.

JukeCharge.description: Howl — charges juke pips (defense resource). Costs meter.

Rebirth.description: Rebirth — revival/comeback super, very high damage. Costs meter.
Rebirth.weakness: extremely slow, short range, costs meter
